# Skybridge App Packager MCP

Paid remote MCP for Skybridge, structured receipts, usage logs, and audit-ready JSON evidence.

Website: https://skybridgepackager.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://skybridgepackager.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://skybridgepackager.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/skybridge-app-packager-mcp-mcp

Use case: Skybridge App Packager MCP remote MCP for Skybridge.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: package_skybridge_app, validate_app_schema, run_client_compatibility_test, export_app_manifest
